title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/containers/buildah@v1.14.2 requires
	github.com/openshift/api@v0.0.0-20200106203948-7ab22a2c8316 requires
	k8s.io/code-generator@v0.17.0 requires
	gonum.org/v1/netlib@v0.0.0-20190331212654-76723241ea4e requires
	golang.org/x/exp@v0.0.0-20190312203227-4b39c73a6495 requires
	golang.org/x/image@v0.0.0-20190227222117-0694c2d4d067: invalid version: git fetch -f origin refs/heads/*:refs/heads/* refs/tags/*:refs/tags/* in /opt/go/gopath/pkg/mod/cache/vcs/352eeab4f93e570632f9ece323fff86316be4bfcafd6c7231b69c0e8eebdd7b7: exit status 128:
	fatal: unable to access 'https://go.googlesource.com/image/': The requested URL returned error: 500
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/26419116).

comments.body: Maybe just a flake in proxy.golang.org?
